strategy.name: Craig Percoco — Range → Change → Execute
strategy.description: ICT/SMC: 15m BOS + Fair Value Gap, then 1m CHoCH + FVG entry
steps: 1. RANGE  (15m): BOS identifies trend direction + 15m FVGs as targets
2. CHANGE (1m):  CHoCH confirms control handoff + 1m FVG forms
3. EXECUTE: Entry = 1m FVG mid | SL = outside liquidity | TP1 = 1:4 | TP2 = 15m FVG mid

notes.bos_timeframe: 15m — Higher Highs+Lows = BULL, Lower Highs+Lows = BEAR
notes.choch_timeframe: 1m — strong candle breaks last swing point in trend direction
notes.fvg: 3-candle gap: wick of candle 1 and wick of candle 3 do not overlap
notes.entry: Limit at mid of 1m FVG, or market at close of CHoCH candle
notes.sl: Just outside the liquidity inflection level (last swing low for long, last swing high for short)
notes.tp2: Mid of 15m FVG — can extend to 1:8 R:R
notes.be: Move SL to break-even when price closes past TP midpoint or confirms direction
